title: The Power 25: The Lead Generation System for Rental Agents
dek: New agents are taught to think of lead generation as a spending problem: buy portal leads, boost posts, pay for placement. Ten years of luxury leasing in Chicago taught me it's a relationship problem, and the whole solution fits on one page. It's called the Power 25.
heroAlt: The Power 25: The Lead Generation System for Rental Agents

blocks.html: Luxury renters flow through luxury buildings. Every building has a leasing office, and every leasing office gets asked constantly: do you know a good agent? The Power 25 is the discipline of becoming the answer to that question in twenty-five specific buildings.

blocks.text: The building already has the leads. Get on its list.

blocks.html: Start with fifty. List fifty luxury buildings in your market in a spreadsheet: name, neighborhood, management company, contact, price range, policies. Then cut to the best twenty-five using four criteria: turnover volume (bigger buildings produce more deals), agent-friendliness (some buildings welcome outside agents, some don't; never fight for access when the door next-door is open), price point (one month's rent has to be worth your time), and clustering (buildings you can walk between let you maintain relationships efficiently).

Contact all twenty-five with a short professional introduction that leads with what you bring: qualified, prepared renters and on-time showings. Then the part that actually builds the machine: a touch rhythm. Every building hears from you about twice a month, forever. A check-in, a thank you, a client brought through, a useful piece of market info.

blocks.text: Show up twice a month, every month. Boring wins.

blocks.html: Month one, you're a name in a spreadsheet. Month three, a manager mentions a unit before it lists, and someone sends you a renter their building couldn't fit. Months four through six, the flywheel: buildings call you, overflow renters become your clients, your clients refer coworkers. Early in my career, a single property manager relationship produced $9,500 in commissions in about a month. You're building twenty-five of those.
The complete Power 25 walkthrough, including the exact scripts, is in my free ebook Luxury Leases, Real Profits. Better agents win.
